preview_hero-liftoff.goal: Prove that a cinematic, multi-voice, orchestral scene can be built in 38 seconds from plain text prompts
steps: Play from the top: 'powered by fal' intro → control room → countdown → liftoff roar → the astronaut's quiet beat → 'written, not recorded' close
Solo the 'Score' track to hear the orchestra under the scene
Remember: every sound here was generated from a single text prompt

preview_cine-trailer.goal: Cut a Hollywood fantasy trailer — booming VO, a hero/villain standoff, and a full orchestral build — entirely from text
steps: Play from the top: the ominous VO → the queen/warlord standoff → the title drop
Solo the 'Score' track — hear it duck under the lines and swell into the braam impact
It closes on 'not one word of this was ever spoken aloud'

preview_cine-brand.goal: Produce an emotional 30-second premium spot — intimate VO over a swelling cinematic bed — from a single line
steps: Play the spot top to bottom
Solo the 'Voiceover' then the 'Score' to hear the balance
It closes on 'this voice was never recorded… powered by fal'

preview_cine-nature.goal: Narrate a wildlife documentary — an Attenborough-style voice over a living savanna soundscape — made from text
steps: Play from first light to the held-breath beat
Solo the 'Savanna ambience' bed to hear the world underneath the voice
It reveals: 'nothing here was captured in the wild'

preview_cine-noir.goal: Stage a rain-soaked detective scene — inner monologue, a tense two-hander, jazz and foley — from prompts
steps: Play: the monologue → the office confrontation
Solo the 'Rain / room' bed and the 'Score' to feel the mood
It closes on 'every footstep, every word — written, not recorded'

preview_cine-game.goal: Score a video-game boss cutscene — a warrior against a titan, battle ambience, a title-card drop — all generated
steps: Play through the standoff into the 'ASHFALL' title drop
Solo the 'Score' — it stays big under the shout, then ducks for the tag
Solo the 'Arena ambience' and 'Impact' layers

preview_cine-calm.goal: Guide a calm meditation — a soft, slow voice over a warm ambient pad and gentle surf — from a couple of lines
steps: Play it slowly, top to bottom, through the long breathing gaps
Solo the 'Ocean bed' and the ambient 'Score'
It closes on 'written, not recorded. Now, breathe.'
